flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Virginia-Main Campus rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.2k → $21.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Virginia-Main Campus rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($53.6k → $59.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Virginia-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Virginia-Main Campus are 46% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($86.9k vs $59.3k).
